perturbation.original_text: Upon receiving a written request from the disclosing party, the receiving party shall cease to use the Confidential Information disclosed to it and shall promptly thereafter return to the disclosing party all written or otherwise documented Confidential Information disclosed to it pursuant to this Agreement, except that one copy of all such Confidential Information may be kept for archival purposes and for the purpose of defending against any lawsuits brought by the disclosing party against the Recipient.
perturbation.changed_text: Upon receiving a written request from the disclosing party, the receiving party shall cease to use the Confidential Information disclosed to it and shall promptly thereafter return to the disclosing party all written or otherwise documented Confidential Information disclosed to it pursuant to this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the exception clause that allows the recipient to retain one copy of Confidential Information for archival purposes and defending against lawsuits, the modified text directly contradicts Section 8, which states that the agreement can only be modified by a written instrument signed by both parties. The removal changes the terms of information return, effectively modifying it without a signed instrument.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement contains the entire agreement of the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and may not be changed, modified, amended or supplemented except by a written instrument signed by the parties. The unenforceability of any provision of this Agreement shall not affect the enforceability of any other provision of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the clause allowing the receiving party to keep a copy of the Confidential Information for archival purposes and defending against lawsuits. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states that the agreement can only be modified by a written instrument signed by both parties. The removal effectively modifies the terms of information return without such a signed instrument, therefore it's a strong contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Recipient agrees to use due care, but in no event less than a reasonable degree of care, to keep Confidential Information disclosed to it pursuant to this Agreement in a safe and secure place that is at least as safe and secure as the place where that party keeps other confidential information that it considers to be valuable and proprietary to itself.
perturbation.changed_text: Recipient agrees to use due care to keep Confidential Information disclosed to it pursuant to this Agreement in a safe and secure place.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the benchmark of 'at least as safe and secure as the place where that party keeps other confidential information that it considers to be valuable and proprietary to itself,' the standard of care becomes ambiguous. This contradicts Section 3, which discusses remedies for violations. Without a clear standard, it becomes difficult to prove a breach of due care.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Recipient acknowledges that any violation of any of the provisions hereof by such party may result in immediate and irreparable damage to other party and agrees that in the event of such violation the other party shall, in addition to any other right, relief or remedy at law, be entitled to any equitable relief that any court of competent jurisdiction may deem just and proper.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes a specific benchmark for 'due care,' making the standard ambiguous. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which outlines remedies for violations. Without a clear standard of care, it becomes difficult to prove a breach and enforce the remedies outlined in the contradicted section. The explanation states that this creates a contradiction, which fits the Omissions - In Text Contradiction definition.

perturbation.original_text: The obligations arising pursuant to this Agreement, including, without limitation, the parties' confidentiality obligations, shall expire on the fifth (5th) anniversary of the date first above written, unless such obligations are modified by a subsequent written agreement between the parties.
perturbation.changed_text: The obligations arising pursuant to this Agreement, shall have perpetual duration.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction with Section 8, which states that the agreement can only be modified by a written instrument signed by the parties. By making the confidentiality obligations perpetual, the termination clause is effectively removed without a signed modification, which is a violation of Section 8 of this NDA agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement contains the entire agreement of the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and may not be changed, modified, amended or supplemented except by a written instrument signed by the parties. The unenforceability of any provision of this Agreement shall not affect the enforceability of any other provision of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text makes the confidentiality obligations perpetual, which directly contradicts the contradicted text stating that the agreement can only be modified by a written instrument signed by the parties. By making the obligations perpetual, it removes the original termination clause without the written modification required, creating a clear conflict as per the explanation and the Omissions – In Text Contradiction definition.
